scope: Skills loader and registry for local, bundled, plugin, and MCP-derived skills.

requiredBehaviors: discovers user-level skills under the AgenC home directory
discovers project-level .agenc/skills and .agents/skills roots while walking from the workspace toward home
preserves legacy command markdown loading as skills
edgeCases: root-level SKILL.md files under a skills root are ignored
nested skill directories produce colon-delimited names
missing roots are skipped without throwing

requiredBehaviors: publishes bundled skills into the same registry as file-based skills
extracts bundled reference files into a path-jailed skill directory before rendering
keeps bundled skills full-fidelity in the budgeted model listing
edgeCases: relative bundled file paths cannot escape the extracted skill directory
bundled skills remain renderable when no user or project skills exist
model-disabled bundled skills are omitted from model-facing listings

requiredBehaviors: discovers skill:// MCP resources when a connected server exposes resources
converts each skill resource into a model-invocable prompt command with loadedFrom mcp
uses the shared MCP skill builder registry so MCP skills parse frontmatter and render with the same command shape as file skills
edgeCases: resource metadata supplies name and description fallbacks when frontmatter is sparse
remote MCP skill markdown does not execute inline shell snippets during rendering

requiredBehaviors: projects loaded skills into command objects consumed by the Skill tool
lists available and invoked skills through the /skills command
merges MCP skills from AppState into model-facing skill listings
edgeCases: plugin and MCP skill names remain namespaced to avoid collisions
unknown Skill tool invocations return an actionable error
invoked skills are recorded after successful render
